overall.description: Static first-person view from a luxury high-rise bedroom in a cyberpunk setting, featuring modern interior design with a platform bed and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a fog-shrouded futuristic cityscape with towering buildings and a palm tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury high-rise bedroom with panoramic city view

translucent glass partition with metallic frame separating room areas
dark wooden nightstand with spherical lamp and objects

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view from a modern luxury bedroom with floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a foggy cyberpunk cityscape. The room features a large platform bed with crisp white linens, dark wood accents, and minimalist furniture. Outside, towering buildings emerge from the thick morning haze with a distinctive palm tree visible, while a red aerial cable car briefly passes by the left window around the 11-second mark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic perspective from a luxury high-rise bedroom that looks out over a dense, fog-shrouded cyberpunk metropolis. It begins within the minimalist interior, where the clean lines of a platform bed with white linens and dark wood accents frame the view. As the gaze settles on the floor-to-ceiling windows, the thick morning haze outside partially obscures the towering futuristic architecture and a solitary palm tree. The scene then shifts in focus as a red aerial cable car glides smoothly across the left side of the frame, cutting through the gray atmosphere before disappearing from view.
